companies.name: Nvidia
companies.reason: Nvidia is trending due to its leading role in the AI revolution, particularly with its GPUs and AI infrastructure. Recent news highlights strong financial performance and optimistic forecasts driven by the demand for AI computing.

companies.name: Palantir Technologies
companies.reason: Palantir is trending due to its growing government contracts and increasing adoption of its AI platforms. News focuses on its strong growth metrics and its role in data analytics and AI solutions for both public and private sectors.

companies.name: SpaceX
companies.reason: SpaceX is trending due to its ambitious space exploration projects, including Starship development and satellite internet service (Starlink). Recent news covers its advancements in space technology and its impact on the commercial space industry.
